message:
feat(fcp-mesh): add gossip bounds checking and integration tests

Add validation for oversized gossip summaries and invalid requests:
- Reject summaries exceeding max_objects_per_summary/max_symbols_per_summary
- Return empty response for invalid requests

Add integration tests for:
- Symbol request no-resend behavior
- Other mesh node scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
